title: Baron Tagge (disambiguation)
content:
'''Baron Tagge''' can refer to at least two members of the [[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]]:

*'''[[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]]''', the eldest son and head of [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]].
*'''[[Ulric Tagge/Legends|Ulric Tagge]]''', the youngest son and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer.

{{Disambig}}
